disclosure_items.clinical_fact: New loss of vision at the outer edges of both eyes, come on today
trigger_question_examples: Tell me about the vision change — where exactly can't you see?
Is it the side vision, the centre, or all of it?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's the sides — I can't see things out to the left and right, like I've got blinkers on. It started today and it's frightening.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Severe bilateral headache building over 48 hours and worse tonight, unlike his usual headaches
trigger_question_examples: How long has the headache been going and how has it changed?
Is this headache different from ones you've had before?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's been building for two days and it's the worst I've ever had — a constant throbbing on both sides. My usual headaches are nothing like this.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Gradual enlargement of hands and feet over about two years — needing bigger ring and shoe sizes
trigger_question_examples: Have you noticed any changes in your body over the past months or years?
Have your rings, shoes or gloves stopped fitting?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yeah — over the last couple of years my hands and feet have got bigger, I had to buy bigger rings and shoes, and my joints ache all the time now.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Coarsening of facial appearance, deepening voice, increased sweating and oily skin over the same period
trigger_question_examples: Has your face, voice or skin changed at all?
Are you sweating more than you used to?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My face has got heavier and my brow more prominent, my voice has gone deeper, and I sweat a lot and my skin's oily.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Severe large-joint pain and weakness causing an acute inability to mobilise safely tonight
trigger_question_examples: How are you moving around at the moment?
Can you walk safely on your own?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My shoulders and knees are so painful and weak I can't walk to the bathroom safely, and I can't grip a cup.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No vomiting, no drowsiness and no sudden thunderclap-onset headache at present (apoplexy screen)
trigger_question_examples: Have you vomited, felt drowsy or confused?
Did the headache ever come on like a sudden explosion?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No vomiting and I'm not drowsy. The headache built up over two days, it didn't hit me suddenly.
disclosure_items.patient_deflection_template: I don't think so — should I be worried about those?
